developer.title: ESGFlow Public API
developer.subtitle: Integrate your ESG data into your tools — dashboards, ERP, BI solutions and more.
developer.keyWarning: Keep it in a safe place — it won't be shown again.
developer.authDesc: The ESGFlow API uses JWT (JSON Web Token) to secure exchanges. Get a token via the login endpoint and pass it in the Authorization header of each request.
developer.indicatorsDesc: Access the full ESG indicator repository. Each indicator is linked to a pillar (environmental, social, governance), a unit of measure and a reference framework (CSRD, GRI, TCFD…).
developer.dataDesc: Record and retrieve your ESG indicator values. Data is versioned and timestamped. Each entry can include notes and supporting documents.
developer.scoresDesc: Calculate and view your aggregated ESG scores. The scoring engine uses a weighted methodology aligned with CSRD standards and sector benchmarks.
developer.reportsDesc: Generate ESG reports compliant with regulatory requirements (CSRD, GRI, TCFD). Reports are produced in PDF or XLSX and stored securely.
developer.webhooksDesc: Receive real-time notifications for key events (new entry, score calculated, report ready). Configure your HTTPS endpoints and manage delivery retries.

integrations.inseeDesc: Access to the official French business registry
integrations.inseeHint: Search and enrich your ESG data with official information
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect ESGFlow to your business tools and systems

materiality.title: Materiality Matrix
materiality.subtitle: CSRD double materiality — Financial and environmental/social impact
materiality.dragDrop: Drag & drop topics onto the matrix
materiality.matrixDragDesc: Drag and drop issues onto the matrix to position them by materiality.
materiality.emptyMatrixLine1: Add issues to see them appear
materiality.emptyMatrixLine2: Use 'AI Suggestions' to get started quickly
materiality.step0Desc: Identify the stakeholders to consult for your materiality analysis.
materiality.step1Desc: Choose the ESG issues to be assessed by your stakeholders.
materiality.step2Desc: Rate the importance of each issue across both materiality dimensions.
materiality.step3Desc: Consolidated results from your stakeholders' assessments.
materiality.iaTabDesc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your sector and suggests relevant materiality issues.
materiality.riskEmptyDesc: Add risks from the materiality matrix.
materiality.benchmarkNote: CSRD benchmark: material issues must cover at minimum ESRS themes E1-E5, S1-S4 and G1-G2 for full compliance.
materiality.matrixDragHint: Drag & drop dots to reposition · Auto-save · Material issues are highlighted in red
materiality.matrixDragSubtitle: dots to reposition · Hover for details · Click to edit
materiality.riskEmptyDescFull: Identify and document your ESG risks to better manage them.
materiality.step0DescFull: Add the stakeholders who will participate in the materiality assessment.
materiality.step1DescFull: Check the issues on which you wish to collect stakeholder feedback.
materiality.noIssuesInMatrix: No issues in the matrix. Add issues in the "Matrix" tab or via "AI Suggestions".
materiality.step2DescFull: For each stakeholder, rate the importance of each issue from 1 (low) to 10 (critical).
materiality.step3DescFull: Average scores calculated from {{count}} evaluations. Click "Apply" to update the matrix.
materiality.iaTabSectorDesc: Select your sector to get pre-configured ESG issues based on CSRD/ESRS standards.
materiality.iaBenchmarkDesc: The proposed financial and ESG impacts are sector benchmarks based on ESRS, GRI and SASB frameworks. They can be customised via the stakeholder questionnaire or directly in the matrix.

decarbonation.catalogSummary: {{count}} action(s) in your plan · {{reduction}} tCO₂e/yr · {{cost}} k€

decarbonation.matrixDesc: Positioning of actions by reduction impact and investment cost.
decarbonation.matrixEmpty: Add actions to your plan to see them appear in the matrix.
decarbonation.trajectoryTabSubtitle: Visualize your progress towards SBTi 1.5°C and Net Zero 2050 targets.
decarbonation.trajectoryInfoBox: The SBTi 1.5°C pathway requires a 42% reduction by 2030 compared to the 2024 base year.

supplychain.title: Supply Chain ESG
supplychain.subtitle: Supplier assessment · Questionnaires · Due diligence
supplychain.questionnaireNotice: The supplier will receive an email with a secure link to complete the questionnaire.
supplychain.vigilanceDisclaimer: This vigilance plan is established in accordance with the French Duty of Vigilance Act (Law 2017-399) and the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises.
supplychain.alertBannerDesc: These suppliers present serious human rights or environmental risks. Immediate action is required under the duty of vigilance (Law 2017-399).
supplychain.vigilanceLawDesc: Companies with more than 5,000 employees in France (or 10,000 worldwide) are legally required to establish and publish a vigilance plan covering their activities, subsidiaries, subcontractors and suppliers. This plan must identify serious risks in terms of human rights, fundamental freedoms, health, safety and the environment.
supplychain.actionCritiqueAudit: Third-party social audit on-site within 60 days
supplychain.actionHighQuestionnaire: ESG questionnaire to be sent within 30 days
supplychain.actionCritiqueImprovement: Binding improvement plan or supplier substitution
supplychain.actionHighMonitoring: Annual monitoring of social and environmental indicators
supplychain.actionDocument: Document in annual vigilance plan report

compliance.title: Multi-Regulatory Compliance
compliance.subtitle: CSRD · EU Taxonomy · DPEF · Sapin II · Due Diligence · SFDR · ISO 14001 · ISO 26000 · LkSG · Article 29
compliance.alertBanner: Urgent actions are required to maintain your regulatory compliance.
compliance.noFrameworkFound: No framework found for this search.
compliance.legalDisclaimer: The information presented is for reference only. Consult a legal expert for any compliance decisions.

audit.title: Audit Trail & Traceability
audit.subtitle: Full journal · Versioning · Evidence documents · ISAE 3000 certifiable
audit.versioningDesc: Every ESG value change is stored with its previous value. Compare versions and navigate the full history.
audit.documentsPendingAlertDesc: Some indicators were rejected by the auditor due to missing evidence. Please upload the missing documents.
audit.dropDocumentsFormats: PDF, Excel, CSV — Max 50 MB per file
audit.auditorAccessDesc: Create a temporary read-only access for your statutory auditor or third-party auditor.
audit.certifiableReportDesc: Compliant with CSRD limited assurance requirements and ISAE 3000 / ISAE 3410 standards
audit.legalDisclaimer: The ESGFlow audit trail complies with CSRD traceability requirements (art. 19a/29a), ISAE 3000 and ISAE 3410 assurance standards, and ICAEW best practices for non-financial verification. Each event is timestamped, hashed (SHA-256) and immutable.

validation.title: Validation Workflow
validation.subtitle: Review and approval of ESG data
validation.workflowSubtitle: Manage the lifecycle of your ESG entries — from draft to approval — to guarantee the integrity and traceability of published data.
validation.draftsDesc: Drafts are ESG entries not yet submitted for validation. To submit a draft for review, go to the indicator detail page, enter or edit a value, then click
validation.rejectPlaceholder: Explain why these entries are being rejected...
validation.rejectWarning: This action will notify the submitter and record the rejection in the audit log.

taxonomy.title: European Taxonomy Alignment
taxonomy.subtitle: Assess the alignment of your economic activities with the six environmental objectives of EU regulation 2020/852 on sustainable finance.
taxonomy.editModeHint: Edit mode: click a row to cycle through alignment status.
taxonomy.contributionHint: The activity substantially contributes to the objective
taxonomy.dnshHint: Does not harm the five other objectives
taxonomy.safeguardsHint: Respect for human rights and social standards
taxonomy.objectiveMitigationDesc: Reduction of GHG emissions and carbon sequestration to limit global warming.
taxonomy.objectiveAdaptationDesc: Strengthening resilience to current and future climate impacts.
taxonomy.objectiveWaterDesc: Protection and sustainable use of fresh water, transitional waters, and marine resources.
taxonomy.objectiveCircularDesc: Transition to circular and resource-efficient production and consumption models.
taxonomy.objectivePollutionDesc: Prevention and reduction of air, water, soil and living organism pollution.
taxonomy.objectiveBiodiversityDesc: Protection and restoration of terrestrial and aquatic biodiversity and ecosystems.

apiDocs.heroSubtitle: Integrate your ESG data into your tools - dashboards, ERP, BI solutions and more.
apiDocs.authDesc: The ESGFlow API uses JWT (JSON Web Token) to secure exchanges. Obtain a token via the login endpoint and pass it in the Authorization header of each request.
apiDocs.indicatorsDesc: Access the complete ESG indicator repository. Each indicator is associated with a pillar (environmental, social, governance), a unit of measure and a reference framework (CSRD, GRI, TCFD...).
apiDocs.dataDesc: Record and view your ESG indicator values. Data is versioned and timestamped. Each entry can include notes and supporting documents.
apiDocs.scoresDesc: Calculate and view your aggregated ESG scores. The scoring engine uses a weighted methodology aligned with CSRD standards and sector benchmarks.
apiDocs.reportsDesc: Generate ESG reports compliant with regulatory requirements (CSRD, GRI, TCFD). Reports are produced in PDF or XLSX and stored securely.
apiDocs.webhooksDesc: Receive real-time notifications for key events (new entry, score calculated, report ready). Configure your HTTPS endpoints and manage delivery attempts.
